semantic_boundary: Assess whether a context packet is adequate for local chapter consistency checks.
interface_contract: Accept a context packet handle and emit an adequacy state plus residual risks.
evaluator_policy: Independent validator checks record shape and evidence labels before default promotion.
evaluator_independence: Candidate implementation cannot edit its own evaluator policy or validation result.
state_migration: No production state migration is authorized by this fixture.
rollback_plan: Retain prior drafting route and reject default promotion if qualification predicates fail.
